kept.text:
I’ll just leave this here…

$NTLA bears: this data is ok 🤷🏻‍♂️ 
Me: you obviously didn’t look at week 36 

Week 36: 
• 20 Lonvo patients w/ 1 total attack
• 12 placebo to Lonvo w/ ZERO attacks 

That’s 1 attack versus 112 at baseline (assuming 3.5 baseline average holds)

🟰 99.1% attack rate reduction

5. 슬프게도 그 진실 여부와 상관 없이 주식 가격은 시장 신뢰를 추종함

결론 :  시장이 먼저 패닉으로 가격을 책정하고, 진실 규명은 한참 뒤에 나옴. 진실이 밝혀지면 회복될 수도 있지만, 그 사이 손실을 버틸 수 있느냐가 개미투자자의 딜레마인듯합니다.

kept.text:
Never have I been more certain that people like Adam M and Adam F are paid shills. $NTLA 

Do people not understand that a “goal” is a top level/best case I’m hoping for? 

87% attack rate reduction vs placebo and 92.6% reduction vs baseline definitely reaches my best possible goal. ✅ 

The 62% was lower than my hope (70-80%) but that number truly isn’t important.

The month of Week 36 (after unblinding at Week 28) had 31/32 patients with ZERO attacks and 1 patient with 1.

That comes out to 1 attack vs 112 expected assuming 3.5 baseline value and that’s a 99.1% reduction. 

Go shill that you idiots.

kept.text:
If you are only in a trade for a small loss at most and that happens. Take the small loss.
Example.
I was trading $NTLA after hours yesterday and I made money.
Today I tried trading it again and I gave myself a small mental stop loss and sold when it hit it.
The stock tanked late today and I avoided a big loss.
